metadata.description: Standalone requirements file auto-generated by syncToFiles

functional.title: Task CRUD Operations
functional.description: Users can create, read, update, and delete tasks with rich metadata including title, description, assignee, labels, priority, due date, and custom fields. All mutations publish domain events for real-time sync.

functional.title: AI Task Prioritization
functional.description: System automatically prioritizes tasks based on deadlines, dependencies, and team patterns using a machine learning model trained on historical completion data. Falls back to rule-based scoring when insufficient training data exists.

functional.title: Focus Mode
functional.description: Deep-work interface with notification batching and focus time tracking. Supports Pomodoro-style timers, P0 breakthrough alerts, and team-configurable notification rules.

functional.title: Dependency Graph Visualization
functional.description: Interactive visual graph showing task dependencies and critical path. Users can click nodes to see details, highlight blocking chains, and identify bottlenecks in the project plan.

functional.title: Sprint Planning Automation
functional.description: AI-assisted sprint planning with capacity-aware task assignment suggestions. The system accounts for team member PTO, meeting load, skill sets, and AI priority scores to propose an optimal sprint backlog.

functional.title: Integration Platform
functional.description: GitHub and Slack bidirectional integrations for seamless developer workflows. PRs auto-link to tasks, Slack slash commands manage tasks, and Focus Mode syncs with Slack DND status.

nonFunctional.title: Response Time
nonFunctional.description: API responses under 200ms for 95th percentile, page loads under 1.5 seconds

nonFunctional.title: Concurrent Users
nonFunctional.description: Support 10,000 concurrent users with graceful degradation up to 50,000

nonFunctional.title: Data Security
nonFunctional.description: SOC 2 Type II compliance, end-to-end encryption for data in transit and at rest, RBAC with SSO

nonFunctional.title: Availability
nonFunctional.description: 99.9% uptime SLA with automated failover and zero-downtime deployments

additional.title: CLI Tool
additional.description: Command-line interface for task management, targeting power-user developers who prefer terminal workflows over web UI
